titleStmt.title: SII 23.401: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 401. (A.R. No. 401 of 1907.) Peruṅgaruṇai, Mudukulattur Taluk, Ramnad District Īśvara temple—on the two door posts of the entrance Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa I: year 44: 1113-14 A.D.

summary.p: This begins with the introduction Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga etc. It registers a gift of some pieces of land to provide for worship and offerings daily and for special observance of important days like the Amāvāsyā every month and the four ayanas of the year in the temple of Tiruvēḷaikkāṟa-mūṉṟukai-Īśvaramuḍaiya Mahādēvar at Taḍaṅgaḻi in Puṉaivāyil of Madurāntaka-vaḷanāḍu, a division of Rājarāja-Pāṇḍināḍu, by Vēḷāṉ Kāḷaiyaviyaṉ alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-[Aḷḷu]-nāḍāḻvāṉ. The inscription is left incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .
pukaḻmātu viḷaṅ
ka jayamātu virum
pa nilamakaḷ nilava
malar makaḷ puṇara Uri
maiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇi
muṭi cūṭi miṉavar
nilaikeṭa villa
var kulaitara Eṉaiyuma
ṉṉavar Irutaluṟṟi
ḷitarat tikkaṉaittu
n=taṉ cakkaranaṭātti
vijaiyaābhiṣekam
paṇṇi virasimhāsa
ṇattu Avaṉimuḻutu
ṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟi
run=taruḷiya korājake
caripanmarāṉa cakkrava
rttikaḷ śrī kulot
tuṅkacoḻadevar
kku yāṇṭu nāṟpa
ttu nālāvatu rā
jarājap pāṇṭinā
ṭṭu maturān=takavaḻanā
ṭṭu puṉaivāyilirukkai
t taṭaṅkaḻi tiruve
ḷaikkāṟa muṉṟukaiyi
śvaramuṭaiya mahāde
varkkum Uṭaṉ paṭi
peṟum devarkaḷukkum
kaṟiyamurtukkum viṣu
vayaṉam nālukkum tiṅ
kaḷtoṟum Eḻun=taruḷum
Amāvāsippaṭikku
m Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavu
kku yāṇṭu nāṟpattu nālāva
tu mutal veḷāṉ kāḷaiya
viyaṉāṉa kulottuṅkaco
ḻa Aḷḷunāṭāḻvāṉeṉ
Ittevarkku
nirvāttukkuṭutta pūmiyā
vatu māy
Itaṉ vaṭakkil nāṟṟa
ṅkāl taṭi Oṉṟum
Araicaṟu kaṇṭi vaya
kkalukku meṟkil ma
ñcaḷivayakkal taṭi O
ṉṟum Itaṉ vaṭakkil
nāṟṟaṅkāl taṭi Oṉ
ṟum mañcaḷivayakkalukku
teṟkil kaṟpakavayakka
l taṭi Oṉṟum Itaṉ ki
ḻakkil kaṇṇukkaḻal
taṭi Oṉṟum Itaṉ te
ṟkil taṭi Oṉṟu kaṟpa
ka vayakkalukku meṟki
l peṟṟāḷ vayakkal ta
ṭi Oṉṟum mañcaḷiva
yakkalukku meṟkil
taṭi Oṉṟum Araicaṟu
kaṇṭi vayakkaliṉ va
ṭakkil nāṟṟukkālukku
kiḻakkil cen=tivayakka
l taṭi Iraṇṭum Āka ta
ṭi patiṉ Oṉṟukkum
kiḻ Ellai kuṟumpūḷai
cakku Araicavayakkal
nāṟṟukkālukkum Itaṉ
teṟkil taṭikkum kāva
ḻa nāṭṭup pallavāy
peṟṟāṉ meḻi
ṭiṉ meṟkum teṉ El
lai coḻaṉ vayakkal
nāṟṟukkālukkum varai
yāmoḻi vayakkalukkum
nāṟṟaṅkālukkum coḻaṉ
vayakkalukkum varaiyā
moḻi vayakkalukkum vaṭakku
m mel Ellai Uyyakkoṇ
ṭāṉ vayakkalukkum mutunilat
tiṭalukkum toṇṭivayakka
lukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai
toḷar vayakkal nāṟṟaṅkālu
kkum cūrakova vayakkalukkum
kaliyañcey nāṟṟaṅkālStops here. Incomplete
Digital edition of SII 23.401 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
